__comment: TEMPLATE — do not point WARDYN_DEFAULT_POLICY at this file. scripts/stage-claude-creds.sh copies ~/.claude[.json] to read-only staging copies OUTSIDE the repo and generates the real policy (default ~/.wardyn/composer-dev-subscription.json) by replacing __WARDYN_CRED_DIR__ with the staging dir. The mount sources are machine-specific, which is why no committed example may carry real paths. This is composer-dev.json plus: (1) '*.anthropic.com' listed VERBATIM (the composer clamp's allowlist intersection is exact-string, so the subscription egress survives only if the ceiling lists it literally), and (2) the two operator-blessed Claude credential mounts that a composed run receives ONLY on the per-run 'Use my Claude subscription' opt-in. It deliberately sets no llm_inspection: subscription transport is an opaque tunnel, and require_inspectable_llm+active-mode without intercept_tls fail-closes at dispatch. HONESTY NOTE: subscription mode makes the (copied) long-lived OAuth credential RESIDENT in the sandbox for the run, reachable-host exfil surface = *.anthropic.com; the api-key path keeps the secret proxy-side. ~/.claude.json also carries MCP config/history — read-only copies mitigate tampering, not reading.
